name: Glacial Lakes Powersports + Golf
about: Glacial Lakes Powersports + Golf operates a multi-sport venue focused on golf simulation and powersports sales. The facility provides four golf simulators available for hourly rental, designed to serve as a year-round golf destination, particularly during winter months. The venue offers flexible booking options, leagues, and memberships alongside retail sales of golf carts and accessories. The atmosphere is described as warm and friendly, with a focus on exceeding customer expectations through high-quality products and services.
why_golfers_like_it: Four high-quality golf simulators available for year-round play
Realistic turf and putting surface for authentic practice experience
Flexible scheduling with leagues and available times outside of league play
Challenge games and tournaments provide variety and competitive fun
Spacious bays allow for comfortable group play and full swing room

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: Full single-screen system with high-performance computer and touchscreen

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available for $15 per session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention on-site food or drink service, and no BYOB policy is specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: One person can typically play 18 holes in approximately one hour. For example, 4 players playing 18 holes would require about 4 hours of simulator time.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue can accommodate groups of 4 to 5 people per simulator and offers challenge games, suggesting a family-friendly environment.
